subject: docs(todo): reconcile Deployment & Configuration section with deployment reality
body:
The section was written as if bootstrapping from scratch. Vercel has been
deploying through many commits, which means VITE_SUPABASE_URL,
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and VITE_API_BASE_URL are already set to real
values (the data-layer hooks boot against Supabase realtime + the
tool-till-tees API regardless of AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED — a placeholder
URL would fail on first channel subscribe).

Remaining owner-gated items clarified:
- Flip AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED — intentional per CLAUDE.md "one environment"
  policy; note the mirrored backend switch required.
- Verify Google OAuth in Supabase dashboard — only becomes relevant the
  moment the bypass flips; may be untested until then.
- Two-browser counterparty-flow testing with bypass off — the genuine
  end-to-end regression gate.

No code change. Docs only.

Tags: docs, todo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
